title: Peppery Crumbly Brazilian Cucumber Soup
description: A smoky, peppered cucumber soup with a crumbly feta topping, simmered in a onepot Brazilian style.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add sliced cucumber and sauté for 3–4 minutes until slightly softened.
Stir in cumin, smoked paprika, and black pepper; cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Pour in coconut milk and chicken broth; bring to a gentle simmer.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and let soup simmer for 15 minutes to blend flavors.
Using an immersion blender, puree the soup until smooth (or transfer in batches to a blender).
Return soup to the pot, add lime juice and season with salt to taste; warm through for 2 minutes.
Ladle soup into bowls, then generously sprinkle crumbled feta cheese over the top.
Garnish each bowl with chopped fresh cilantro.
Serve immediately with crusty gluten‑free bread or as a light lunch.
